mapper.select: SELECT s.*, COALESCE(SUM(d.current_power), 0) current_power, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(g.generation),0) FROM generation_record g WHERE g.station_id=s.id AND g.record_date=CURDATE()) today_generation, (SELECT m.water_level FROM monitoring_record m WHERE m.station_id=s.id ORDER BY m.recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1) water_level, (SELECT m.flow_rate FROM monitoring_record m WHERE m.station_id=s.id ORDER BY m.recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1) inflow FROM station s LEFT JOIN device d ON s.id=d.station_id AND d.device_type='GENERATOR' GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id
SELECT g.*, s.station_name FROM generation_record g JOIN station s ON s.id=g.station_id WHERE g.record_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY g.record_date ASC, g.station_id
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(record_date,'%Y-%m') month, ROUND(SUM(generation),1) generation, ROUND(SUM(plan_generation),1) plan FROM generation_record GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(record_date,'%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT s.station_name stationName, ROUND(SUM(g.generation),1) generation, ROUND((SUM(g.generation)/SUM(g.plan_generation)-1)*100,1) yoy FROM station s JOIN generation_record g ON s.id=g.station_id GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY generation DESC
SELECT a.*, s.station_name, d.device_name FROM alarm a JOIN station s ON s.id=a.station_id LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id=a.device_id ORDER BY FIELD(a.status,'ACTIVE','RESOLVED'), a.occurred_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm SET status='RESOLVED', handler=#{handler}, handled_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT w.*, s.station_name, d.device_name FROM work_order w JOIN station s ON s.id=w.station_id LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id=w.device_id ORDER BY FIELD(w.status,'PROCESSING','PENDING','COMPLETED'), w.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order(order_code, station_id, device_id, title, description, owner, priority, status, due_date) VALUES(#{orderCode},#{stationId},#{deviceId},#{title},#{description},#{owner},#{priority},#{status},#{dueDate})
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND((SELECT SUM(current_power) FROM device WHERE device_type='GENERATOR'),2) currentPower, (SELECT SUM(installed_capacity) FROM station) installedCapacity, ROUND((SELECT SUM(generation) FROM generation_record WHERE record_date=CURDATE()),1) todayGeneration, ROUND((SELECT SUM(generation) FROM generation_record WHERE DATE_FORMAT(record_date,'%Y-%m')=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m')),1) monthGeneration, ROUND((SELECT SUM(generation) FROM generation_record WHERE YEAR(record_date)=YEAR(CURDATE())),1) yearGeneration, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarm WHERE status='ACTIVE') activeAlarms, ROUND((SELECT SUM(status IN ('RUNNING','ONLINE'))/COUNT(*)*100 FROM device),1) onlineRate
